get.description: Unauthenticated health check for load balancers and orchestrators.

post.description: Verify the password and return a JWT access token with role and session identity.

get.description: Return token validity, role, session identity, and expiration timestamp.

post.description: Accept an uploaded video, validate it, create a job, and enqueue the pipeline.

get.description: Return the caller-visible jobs list.

Return the status of a single job.

Judges may only access their own jobs. Admins may access any job.
Returns 404 (not 403) for inaccessible jobs to avoid existence leaks.

delete.description:
Remove a job from the store and delete all its data from disk.

Judges may only delete their own jobs. Admins may delete any job.
Returns 404 for inaccessible or nonexistent jobs.

get.description: Stream/serve the original uploaded video file.
Stream/serve the rendered simulation video file.
Return a manifest of available artifacts and convenience URLs for one job.
Return both stage review snapshots that currently exist for a job.
Return the persisted snapshot for one review stage.
Stream one review stage over Server-Sent Events with persisted replay.
Return the persisted read-only mapping calibration snapshot for one job.

post.description: Schedule a read-only mapping calibration run and return its current snapshot.

get.description: Stream mapping calibration events over Server-Sent Events with persisted replay.
Return the persisted adaptive orchestration snapshot for one job.

post.description: Schedule an adaptive orchestration run for a completed job.

get.description: Stream adaptive orchestration events over SSE with persisted replay.
List mapping refinement sessions for one completed job.

post.description: Create a checkpointed mapping session seeded from the current job mapping profile.

get.description: Return one mapping session and its checkpoint history.

post.description: Append one immutable mapping checkpoint to an active session.
Restore one checkpoint as the current mapping revision for the session.

get.description: List persisted reviewer-assistant sessions for one job.

post.description: Create a reviewer-assistant session and optionally seed the first user message.

get.description: Return one assistant session plus its transcript.

post.description: Append a user message and trigger one bounded assistant loop.

get.description: Stream reviewer-assistant events for one session over SSE.
Stream a zip archive of the complete output directory.
Download a specific artifact or zipped dataset branch for a job.
Return all jobs in the store (admin only, unfiltered).

Aggregate job counts grouped by judge_session_id (admin only).

Sessions without a judge_session_id (e.g. admin-submitted jobs or legacy
jobs with None) are excluded from the summary.

ArtifactManifestResponse.description: Manifest of generated artifacts for a completed or partially completed job.

AssistantSessionCreateRequest.description: Create a reviewer-assistant session, optionally with a seed user message.

AssistantSessionListResponse.title: AssistantSessionListResponse

AssistantSessionStatus.title: AssistantSessionStatus
AssistantSessionStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an interactive reviewer-assistant session.

CalibrationDecision.title: CalibrationDecision
CalibrationDecision.description: Decision label emitted by the mapping calibrator.

CalibrationSnapshotResponse.title: CalibrationSnapshotResponse
CalibrationSnapshotResponse.description: Public-facing mapping calibration snapshot returned to the client.

CalibrationStatus.title: CalibrationStatus
CalibrationStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an asynchronous mapping calibration sub-job.

CalibrationVerdict.title: CalibrationVerdict
CalibrationVerdict.description: High-level usability verdict emitted by the mapping calibrator.

CaptureGuidancePayload.description: Structured capture guidance returned for unsalvageable clips.
CaptureGuidancePayload.title: CaptureGuidancePayload

JobResponse.title: JobResponse
JobResponse.description:
Public-facing job status returned to the client.

Uses the canonical JobStatus and PipelineStage from domain.enums. The
current_stage field reflects the stage the pipeline is currently executing
or last executed if the job has reached a terminal state.

JobStatus.title: JobStatus
JobStatus.description:
Coarse-grained lifecycle state of a Job.

A Job has exactly one status at any moment. Status describes *where* the
Job is in its lifecycle, while PipelineStage describes *what is running*
during the RUNNING state. The two are orthogonal concepts.

Canonical transitions:
    QUEUED → RUNNING → COMPLETED
    QUEUED → RUNNING → FAILED
    QUEUED → CANCELLED
    RUNNING → CANCELLED (best-effort signal checked between stages)

MappingCheckpointCreateRequest.title: MappingCheckpointCreateRequest
MappingCheckpointCreateRequest.description: Submit a new mapping checkpoint into a session.

MappingCheckpointRestoreRequest.title: MappingCheckpointRestoreRequest
MappingCheckpointRestoreRequest.description: Restore one existing checkpoint as the current mapping revision.

MappingSessionCreateRequest.title: MappingSessionCreateRequest
MappingSessionCreateRequest.description: Create a mapping refinement session for a completed job.

MappingSessionDetailResponse.title: MappingSessionDetailResponse
MappingSessionDetailResponse.description: Mapping session plus its checkpoint history.

MappingSessionListResponse.title: MappingSessionListResponse
MappingSessionListResponse.description: Wrapper for listing mapping sessions attached to a job.

MappingSessionStatus.title: MappingSessionStatus
MappingSessionStatus.description: Lifecycle state for a checkpointed mapping refinement session.

OrchestrationDecision.title: OrchestrationDecision
OrchestrationDecision.description: Decision emitted after adaptive pipeline orchestration evaluation.

OrchestrationSnapshotResponse.title: OrchestrationSnapshotResponse
OrchestrationSnapshotResponse.description: Public-facing orchestration snapshot returned to the client.

OrchestrationStatus.title: OrchestrationStatus
OrchestrationStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an orchestration evaluation run.

PipelineStage.title: PipelineStage
PipelineStage.description:
Ordered processing phase within the video-to-dataset pipeline.

Stages run in fixed order: INGEST → PREPROCESS → POSE → RETARGET →
EVALUATE → PACKAGE → FINALIZE. Each stage produces a well-defined output
artifact consumed by the next stage.

A Job's stage is independent of its overall JobStatus. A failed Job reports
which stage it failed in; a completed Job records stage-level timing.

ReviewListResponse.title: ReviewListResponse
ReviewListResponse.description: Container for both stage reviews attached to one job.

ReviewSnapshotResponse.title: ReviewSnapshotResponse
ReviewSnapshotResponse.description: Public-facing stage review snapshot returned to the client.

ReviewStage.title: ReviewStage
ReviewStage.description:
Bounded review stage attached to a completed pipeline job.

POSE reviews the extracted human skeleton outputs and decides whether the
pose-stage dataset is useful. RETARGET reviews the mapped robot-joint
artifacts and decides whether the robot dataset is usable.

ReviewStatus.title: ReviewStatus
ReviewStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an asynchronous review sub-job.

ReviewVerdict.title: ReviewVerdict
ReviewVerdict.description: Stage-level usability verdict emitted by review agents.

SessionSummary.title: SessionSummary
SessionSummary.description: Aggregated summary of all jobs owned by a single judge session.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description:
JWT token returned on successful authentication.

Includes role and judge_session_id for frontend awareness so the UI can
display the caller's identity context without decoding the JWT itself.

OrchestrationStatus.description: Lifecycle state for an orchestration evaluation run.

OrchestrationTracePayload.description:
Structured human-readable execution transcript entry.

This is intentionally limited to observable execution summaries and tool-like
actions. It must not contain hidden chain-of-thought.
OrchestrationTracePayload.title: OrchestrationTracePayload
